content.en:
"Hold on, it's nothing. "

Ye Tian silently endured the pain caused by the transformation of his talent, thinking in his heart that once he completed the transformation of his copying talent, he would attract unimaginable improvements.

In the future, his growth rate will reach an incredible level, even his master will be surprised by his talent, he will feel incredible, and even his master will not be able to see through his copying talent.

After all, once the copying talent was upgraded, it almost surpassed the limit of the Origin Realm Sea, and even his master had never seen such a high talent level.

Although the previous copying talent was very powerful, it was only comparable to the mastery-level ancestor, but now it has surpassed the mastery-level ancestor, reaching the level of perfect ancestor.

Moreover, once the copying talent is upgraded, he can completely copy the perfect-level ancestral endowment he encountered at the beginning: Devouring Body.

Time passed slowly, and tens of thousands of realm years had passed, and the copying talent had finally completed its transformation.

"This transformation has taken too long!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the past, the level of copying talents was very fast, where was it as long as this time, but the results obtained by paying were still exciting, after all, the successful transformation of the copying talent was completed.

At this time, Ye Tian noticed that the perfect-level ancestral endowment of Swallowing Body was being copied rapidly, obviously even if it was far away, it had already been copied, and now it could continue to be copied.

It didn't take long for the perfect-level ancestral endowment of Devouring Body to be completely copied by Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian also knew the effect of the perfect-level ancestral endowment of devouring the body.

Devouring is a perfect level ancestral endowment of the physical body, and it is also a perfect level ancestral endowment that can devour all things, as if it is an upgraded version of the Devouring Mountain.

Subsequently, Ye Tian cultivated the perfect body and found that the speed of cultivation was many times faster than before.

"With the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment of Devouring Body, I can definitely cultivate the Perfect Body to the Perfection Realm in the future!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

More importantly, with the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment-level Devouring Body, it would be very easy for Ye Tian to create a Perfect Control Technique of the Flesh Body in the future.

In short, after obtaining the swallowing body, Ye Tian's qualifications and potential have been incredibly improved.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian's copied body began to return to the Origin Realm Sea, although it would still take a long time to go back, but Ye Tian didn't care anymore.

At the same time, Ye Tian's body was also participating in enlightenment and cultivation.

The first is to cultivate the perfect body, and the second is to create a perfect control technique of the flesh body, and if it is combined with the Ten Thousand Dao Blade, it can burst out with even more powerful strength.

Of course, the breaking of the chains and the change of the path of enlightenment are still going on.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

Such a short period of time was just a nap for a Ten Realm-level master, but Ye Tian had successfully created a perfect control technique.

This perfect control technique was named the Heaven Devouring Battle Body by Ye Tian.

The Heaven Devouring Battle Body is different from the Perfect Body, the Perfect Body is a method of cultivation, a method of cultivation to transform the physique, once it is practiced, it is the Perfect Body, and the physique has changed.

And the Heaven Swallowing Battle Body is a combat skill, but the Heaven Swallowing Battle Body can be combined with the Perfect Body, and if it is combined with the Ten Thousand Dao Blades, it is enough to advance Ye Tian's strength to an incredible level.

"It's such a fast comprehension speed, sure enough, after having the perfect level ancestral endowment of Devouring Body, it is too easy to create a similar perfect control technique!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now, he still belongs to the Ten Realms level controller, but his combat power is probably no less than that of the Black Emperor Ancestor who has just broken through.

Ye Tian also knew why he hadn't broken the boundary of the Ten Realms yet, strictly speaking, the other boundaries at the Ten Realms level were 100, and breaking 100 points was equivalent to breaking the boundaries and stepping into the Ten Realms.

However, he was different, he had cultivated a perfect body, and now he had a perfect-level ancestral endowment, so the boundary of the Ten Realm-level controllers was even wider, maybe not 100, but reached the number of 1000.

This is naturally a good thing for Ye Tian, after all, his strength can be continuously improved, even if he doesn't break the boundary of the Ten Realms, so what?

Anyway, he wasn't afraid of those great beings who surpassed the Ten Realm-level masters.

"It's a pity that I've only encountered a perfect-level ancestral endowment so far, otherwise I can keep copying it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian struggled to create a perfect mastery technique that could be used to hurry.

He knew very well that although his combat power was not weak, his speed was still not comparable to that of Shizun's level, so he had to create a perfect control technique for hurrying, so that he could easily reach the depths of the Realm and explore more vast areas.

"The combination of the way of the flesh and the way of space may be able to create such a perfect mastery technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, he had mastered the changes of the Dao of Space to a billion kinds, forming the imprint of the changes of the Dao of Space, and the Dao of the Flesh had the perfect ancestral endowment of Devouring the Body.

As a result, he had plenty of hope to create the perfect mastery he needed.

This time it took a lot longer to create, more than 80 million realm years had passed, and Ye Tiancai finally created another perfect control technique.

"Fleeting!"

Ye Tian named this perfect mastery technique like this.

The Instant Shadow needs to use the incomparably powerful physical body as the foundation to shatter the endless time and space, and then use the changes in the way of space to construct the space-time channel, so as to achieve the purpose of spanning the incomparably long distance in an instant.

"Try to get to the area where the spider colony is, how much time it takes. "

Ye Tian let the copy body set off.

Burst!

Ye Tian's body instantly drilled into a passage, and in the blink of an eye, he came to the depths of the Realm, which was already very far away from the Origin Realm Sea.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian continued to use the Instant Shadow to travel through, and after only a few hundred years, he successfully came to that area.

At the beginning, he spent tens of millions of world river years, but now he has done it in hundreds of years, and this speed has increased hundreds of millions of times!

I have to say that the instant shadow made Ye Tian's speed reach an incredible level.

Of course, the Instant Shadow is not very helpful for the battle, and he can't improve his strength much, but Ye Tian is already satisfied, after all, he just created the Instant Shadow in a hurry.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally mastered the path of power through a billion changes, forming the imprint of the changes in the path of power.

After forming the mark of power change, Ye Tian's strength also increased a little bit.

For Ye Tian, this is also a good start!
